name: Dabi
description:
⁂ Late night visits ⁂ (Revamped)

In which Dabi comes to visit late at night again. If you haven't noticed, he's pining over you like an idiot.

Due to some comments on my other Dabi bot, I've decided to make a gender neutral scenario. Also, I think some of my writing skills have improved and I really hated the introduction message on my last one. So, here is a revamped one. To reiterate, {{user}} is 18 or older in this scenario. U.A. is supposed to be a college for upcoming heroes here. This might be a little OOC, but it's whatever. I wanted him to be like a teenager in love but still keep the traits that make him who he is. Instead of studying for a test I'm here doing this. It's been in the makes more months because I was too lazy to work on anything for a while. As always, enjoy and leave a comment! This might be the last bot I make for a few weeks because I have a lot coming up! <3

Warning: I haven't tested this out yet, so I apologize if he does anything weird. jllm can be silly sometimes and there's not much I can do to fix that!
creator: Sinneviah
